flavor:
The feelings of the Heroic Spirits who once formed a bond with the Heir.
Centered around a single knight, they have crystallized here. Her name has been renewed as Elaine.

flavor:
Arianrod is dedicated to beauty and honing her feminine charm.
Her healthy, curvaceous figure captivates everyone’s gaze.

info.name: Metatron [Divine Realization]

flavor:
Metatron had been behaving gracefully as a “Messenger of God.”
However, her encounter with the Heir served as the catalyst that brought her true nature to the surface.

flavor:
A god who, together with the Heirs, overcame a fate of destruction.
From now on, she has decided to walk alongside humans and the Goddesses as a comrade.

flavor:
Diankecht begins to view the Heir as special due to a mysterious miasma.
While acknowledging this, he works with the Heir to find a way to treat everyone fairly.

flavor:
Eris, the mistress of the Magic Tower and a peerless villainess who loves a good fight.
…Or so it seems—in reality, she’s a pure-hearted lady who’s actually quite lonely.

flavor:
Taking advantage of her stay in the snowy mountains, Proserpina dons a yukata.
As she enjoys the hot springs, a change in her state of mind and a sense of allure begin to emerge.

flavor:
Masashi Yasumi’s guardian ninja, who came from another world.
Although she is a top-tier kunoichi, she has the temperament of a born NEET.

flavor:
After the incident, Onidomaru had a change of heart and joined the Heirs.
Taking the linked wishes in hand, he dashes out into the crystal-clear blue sky.

Responding to her master’s wish, Satanakia’s wish was elevated.
Holding the wish to “keep my master alive and walk alongside him,” she dances.

Epimetheus got soaked at a water balloon fight festival.
Even though the wet fabric is see-through, he doesn’t seem “all that” embarrassed.

After undergoing the Trial of True Love, Hecate realized her feelings for the Heir.
She vows that even if she becomes a rival to Caspiel, she will not give up her love for the Heir.

Yamato Takeru, imbued with the hopes of the people of Yamato, has awakened to a new power.
A single white swan always watches over her as she fights for the people.

Olsen is filming a new movie set in the alternate world she has visited.
